title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 9th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: SIP; slight underperformance vs peers but not material, continue.
recommendations.detail: SIP; slight underperformance vs SBI/ICICI/Bandhan large-cap peers, but not material, nor a worrying factor. Continue.

recommendations.note: IT-heavy thematic; can't give full marks now, revisit after IT earnings.
recommendations.detail: IT-predominant thematic; can't give full marks now. Decide for yourself; ask again after IT companies' earnings and management commentary give clarity on road map/earnings visibility.

recommendations.note: Not a bad stock; valuations low in this uncertain market.
recommendations.detail: Hold; not a very bad stock, and in the current uncertain atmosphere valuations too are low.

recommendations.note: Check March result; if good hold, if messy exit. Listed <1 year.
recommendations.detail: Recently listed (<1 yr history); at ~140, down from 250. December result was fine but check March result; if good continue/hold, if any confusion/mess in result you can exit.

recommendations.note: Was very negative; management do-or-die effort + EV tailwinds may help, 45-46 could return.
recommendations.detail: Bought 1,000 @ 46; now ~30. Was repeatedly very negative (said shouldn't exceed 20-30 from ~1 rupee start), but management's do-or-die effort and recent developments + EV space tailwinds may benefit the price. Hold even if 45-46 takes time.

recommendations.note: Recovery likely; ~550 if this quarter's results are good.
recommendations.detail: 100 shares @ 50. Recovery chances even though entered at a high; not far off, ~550 will come, probably if this time's results are good.

recommendations.note: Don't average now (results time); average only after analysing results.
recommendations.detail: In ~10% loss. This is results time, so not the time to average; only after seeing and analysing results should you average.

recommendations.note: Don't average now (results time); average only after analysing results.
recommendations.detail: In ~30% loss. This is results time, so not the time to average; only after seeing and analysing results should you average.

recommendations.note: More resilient than many other tech stocks in this fall.
recommendations.detail: Bought at 1,740. Hold; it is more resilient than many other tech stocks in this fall.

recommendations.note: Underperformed from listing but worth buying for the long term.
recommendations.detail: Planned ~25,000 long-term investment. Underperformed a bit from listing, but definitely a buy now.

recommendations.note: Decide after results (Q4 comes after market hours today).
recommendations.detail: Planned ~25,000 long-term investment. Decide after the result, which comes after market hours today.

recommendations.stock: MSCI China A 50 Connect Index ETF
recommendations.note: Avoid Chinese market (too hard to track); prefers US (Nasdaq 100) for global exposure.
recommendations.detail: Understanding the India market is itself a huge task; the Chinese market we still don't know. Prefers US markets (Nasdaq 100) for diversification as they're easier to track via the Telugu diaspora info flow; not the Chinese market.

recommendations.note: Gave returns; should give decent returns but wait 1-2 more days (premiums high).
recommendations.detail: Gave returns yesterday. Won't move much for 40-50 points as premiums are high; should give decent returns but wait another 1-2 days; will slowly decline if no surprising global developments. (An unnamed put at ~406, +~7.5-9% — book profit if in profit.)

recommendations.note: Don't average; financially stressed, exit on any rally (only for high-risk appetite).
recommendations.detail: 400 shares @ 36. Don't average; goes through a lot of financial tussle, only for high-risk appetite. If any rallies come, exit.

recommendations.note: Capital-market proxy; next big move likely with the NSE IPO.
recommendations.detail: 600 shares @ 2,455. Capital-market-related stock (good when markets are good). With the NSE IPO coming and uncertainty over how it lists post-crash, the next big move would come only with the NSE IPO.

recommendations.note: One of the better-performing banks; risen well.
recommendations.detail: 500 shares @ 213. A stock that's risen well; definitely one of the better-performing banks, so a hold.

recommendations.note: Beaten-down infra; govt (central+state) infra spending supports; average after quarterly commentary.
recommendations.detail: Infra stock, badly beaten down, but central and state government infra spending supports it. Hold; do averaging only after quarterly commentary.
